description: Create an exterior lighting load and sub-meter for the 4StoreyBuilding project. Define a Day Schedule named 'SiteLt-Sch' for dusk-to-dawn operation (ON from 7 PM to 6 AM and OFF otherwise). Establish an Electric Meter named 'Ext Lighting Meter' and an Exterior Lighting load named 'Parking & Facade Lts' with a 4.5 kW power rating, assigned to the new schedule and meter. Run the annual simulation and save the project.
